title: Dwell is the metric your music moves first. — Daniel Fox
meta_description: How to increase dwell time in your stores: tempo and volume set the pace people move at and how long they stay. Music is the dwell lever most chains never touch.

schema.headline: Dwell is the metric your music moves first.
schema.description: How to increase dwell time in your stores: tempo and volume set the pace people move at and how long they stay, which makes music the dwell lever most retailers leave on default.
